title: apodandra corniculata
intro: Apodandra corniculata, also known as the Apodanthera, is a plant species in the Celastraceae family that is native to tropical regions. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Apodandra corniculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves drying the leaves or roots, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
